_comment: Curated vendor-label aliases for acronyms / initialisms / hard typos that resolveBP's strict + Levenshtein + historical-VQ tiers can't catch. Each entry maps a label to a c_bpartner.value (search_key), NOT a name — the search-key path in resolveBP is exact-match and avoids the iDempiere REST 500s that hit when canonical names contain special chars (parentheses, commas, periods).
_format: Keys are uppercased + whitespace-collapsed for case/space-insensitive lookup. Values are objects { searchKey, name } — searchKey is what resolveBP uses to look up the BP; name is human-readable annotation so future maintainers can spot-check.
_governance: Add an entry only when (a) operator has confirmed the mapping at least once (e.g., via clarify reply), AND (b) the historical-VQ fallback can't catch it (label doesn't appear as a substring of the canonical name, e.g. acronyms like XJH). Remove if the BP record is renamed.

XJH.name: Xin Jun Hong (HK) Industry Co., Ltd
